import pytest
from source import process_batch

def test_process_batch_includes_last_item():
    # Test data with multiple items
    items = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]
    expected_results = [item * 2 for item in items]
    
    # Call the buggy function
    results = process_batch(items)
    
    # Assert that the output list has the same length as the input list
    assert len(results) == len(items), f"Expected {len(items)} results, got {len(results)}"
    assert results == expected_results, f"Expected results {expected_results}, got {results}"
